visual_summary: A HeroVideoDialog is used for displaying a hero video on desktop and a thumbnail for mobile and is used on a website's home page.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Hero Video Dialog Demo
Description: A HeroVideoDialog is used for displaying a hero video on desktop and a thumbnail for mobile and is used on a website's home page.
Style: dark, light, responsive
Interactions: clickable
Tags: hero, video, dialog, mobile, desktop

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
import { HeroVideoDialog } from "@/registry/magicui/hero-video-dialog"

export default function HeroVideoDialogDemo() {
  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <HeroVideoDialog
        className="block dark:hidden"
        animationStyle="from-center"
        videoSrc="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qh3NGpYRG3I?si=4rb-zSdDkVK9qxxb"
        thumbnailSrc="https://startup-template-sage.vercel.app/hero-light.png"
        thumbnailAlt="Hero Video"
      />
      <HeroVideoDialog
        classN
